/usr/bin/c++ --coverage CMakeFiles/test_object_store.dir/tests/test_object_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_object_store.dir/storageHandling/hasher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_object_store.dir/storageHandling/object_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_object_store.dir/storageHandling/commit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_object_store.dir/storageHandling/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_object_store.dir/storageHandling/repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_object_store.dir/storageHandling/utils.cpp.o -o test_object_store  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
